data.raceComments: {"comment":"2. ZIPPING WINMALEE settled well back early on debut and always towards the tail to finish seventh (19.09) at this track over 320m. Better for the run and makes appeal this time. 5. DARK MONEY bolted in last time, scoring by 3 lengths in slick time (18.47) to take a Maiden in a new PB this course and distance. Harder here but will be in this for a long way. 1. QUEEN CARAMEL recorded her best time this course and distance latest, finishing a 4 length third behind Go Forward Tiger in 18.59. Strong run latest and looks a key chance on that form. 8. WAKE UP SHADOW has been in the frame at his last two runs, most recently when third (23.62) in a Maiden over 400m at Dubbo. Good beginner but will need a little luck early crossing from on outside draw.","runners":[2,5,1,8],"exclusive":false}

extraMarkets.name: RICHMOND-R2-Fav Out
extraMarkets.message: Must finish 1st or 2nd behind N/A Runner
